title: WorksheetsRequest
description: WorksheetsRequest: IRequest that pulls worksheet names from an Excel file.

NameContains.description: Optional filter for worksheets where the name contains the string provided. If left blank, then all worksheets will be returned.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
